name: English
hero.lead: Shortix turns long URLs into fast, branded short links — with analytics on clicks, countries, and devices built in.
proof.label: Trusted by teams shipping links every day
features.title: Everything a link needs
features.lead: From a single QR code to a full API, Shortix gives every link a dashboard of its own.
feat1.title: Real-time analytics
feat1.body: Watch clicks roll in by time, country, device and browser — no setup required.
feat2.title: Instant QR codes
feat2.body: Every short link ships with a scannable QR code, ready for print or screen.
feat3.title: Developer API
feat3.body: Create and manage links programmatically with a simple REST API and API key.
feat4.title: Custom slugs
feat4.body: Pick your own short link ending on Pro — shortix.xyz/launch instead of a random code.
feat5.title: Sub-50ms redirects
feat5.body: Edge-cached redirects mean your links resolve before the click even registers.
feat6.title: Privacy-respecting
feat6.body: We track aggregate location and device data — never personal identifiers.
pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when you grow.
pricing.lead: No credit card required to try Shortix.
plan.free.f1: Up to 5 links, no account needed
footer.tagline: The link shortener with a dashboard worth checking.
dash.title: Dashboard
dash.empty: No links yet — create your first one.
modal.create.title: Create a short link
modal.create.sub: Paste a destination URL and Shortix does the rest.
modal.field.slug.hint: Leave empty for a random short code
modal.delete.title: Delete this link?
modal.delete.sub: This can't be undone. The short link will stop redirecting immediately.
stats.page.title: Link analytics
toast.upgraded: 🎉 You're now on Pro! Welcome aboard.
toast.notfound: That short link was not found.
toast.upgrade_prompt: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited links and full API access.
